name: Rosalynn's Plains Cheese Ring
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Sharp cheddar cheese - finely grated
Whole grain crackers OR Melba toast
recipeInstructions:
One of Mrs. Carter's favorite recipes was for a simple cheddar cheese mold served in a ring to be spread on crackers. This cheese appetizer was prepared for many of the Carter family dinners and some of their official functions.
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the grated cheddar cheese with mayonnaise.
2. Add chopped pecans and finely chopped onions.
3. Mix in 6 twists of black pepper and 1 dash of cayenne pepper.
4. Blend thoroughly until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
5. Press the mixture into a 3-cup mold.
6. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours to allow the cheese to set.
7. To serve, gently dip the chilled mold into a pan of hot water for 15 to 20 seconds.
8. Carefully turn the mold out onto a serving platter.
9. Fill the center with strawberry preserves.
10. Serve immediately with whole grain crackers or melba toast.
